    name - Variable in class Model.Player

    net_Fly() - Method in interface View.Client.ClientState
    Returns a string representation of the current client state.
    net_Fly() - Method in class View.Client.States.Connected.LoggedIn.GameSelected.PlayingState
    Executes the action to fly in the game.
    net_JoinFailed() - Method in interface View.Client.ClientState
    Handles the failure of joining a game.
    net_JoinFailed() - Method in class View.Client.States.Connected.LoggedIn.UnconfirmedSelectionState
    Handles the event when a user fails to join a game.
    net_JoinSuccess(Game) - Method in interface View.Client.ClientState
    Handles the successful joining of a game.
    net_JoinSuccess(Game) - Method in class View.Client.States.Connected.LoggedIn.UnconfirmedSelectionState
    Handles the event when a user successfully logs in.
    net_Leave(String) - Method in interface View.Client.ClientState
    Handles the action of leaving a game.
    net_Leave(String) - Method in class View.Client.States.Connected.LoggedIn.GameSelectedState
    Handles the action of leaving the current game.
    net_LoginFailed(String) - Method in interface View.Client.ClientState
    Handles the failure of logging in.
    net_LoginFailed(String) - Method in class View.Client.States.Connected.UnconfirmedLoginState
    Handles the case when a login attempt fails.
    net_LoginSuccess(String) - Method in interface View.Client.ClientState
    Handles the successful login of a user.
    net_LoginSuccess(String) - Method in class View.Client.States.Connected.UnconfirmedLoginState
    Returns the username of the user who has logged in.
    net_Reward() - Method in interface View.Client.ClientState
    Handles the action of rewarding the client.
    net_Reward() - Method in class View.Client.States.Connected.LoggedIn.GameSelected.Playing.FlightState
    Returns the context of the current game state.
    net_Start() - Method in interface View.Client.ClientState
    Handles the action of starting the client.
    net_Start() - Method in class View.Client.States.Connected.LoggedIn.GameSelected.LobbyState
    Starts the game by transitioning to the BuildingState.
